title: Optimizing Claude usage for Postliterate project
first_prompt: Analyze my usage of Claude Cowork and Chat and Code on the Postliterate Book project and suggest how I should optimize my usage, where I’m being inefficient, and what I should change in order to maxim
summary: Irwin sought an analysis of his workflow to optimize his use of Claude's various tools—Cowork, Chat, and Code—for the Postliterate Book project. When the assistant initially requested more context, Irwin pressed the system to confirm its ability to view the project files, specifically mentioning the "Knowledge Graph Design doc." The assistant ultimately clarified its technical limitations, explaining that because Irwin was communicating outside of the defined project scope, it could not access the project's internal memory or contents.
